CustomField.description: Drives delivery flow branching: Multiple-Choice routes to answer selection; Open-Ended routes to Penny-Coached Review; Scenario-Based routes to Trail Quest pattern. Information about the correct answer
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Drives delivery flow branching: Multiple-Choice routes to answer selection; Open-Ended routes to Penny-Coached Review; Scenario-Based routes to Trail Quest pattern. Information about the correct answer
CustomField.label: Correct Answer Explanation
